api_command: cd /Users/user/Documents/sap-oss/data-cleaning-copilot-main && uv run python -m bin.api -d finsight --data-dir /Users/user/Documents/sap-oss/docs/Archive/machine-readable --port 8000
starter_prompts: Profile FINSIGHT_CORE_RECORDS and summarize data quality risk by column.
Run validation and list checks with the highest violation counts.
Investigate fields related to personal data and sensitivity classifications.
Analyze SOURCE_TO_TABLE and TABLE_TO_FIELD graph edges for coverage gaps.
